about: Windsor Pizza has been proudly serving the Windsor, CT community for over 16 years, specializing in pizza, pasta, salads, wings, and more. As an independently operated neighborhood pizzeria, they are committed to quality ingredients and generous portions at fair prices. With delivery, pickup, and curbside options available daily, Windsor Pizza makes it easy to enjoy a delicious meal whether you are dining at home or on the go.

designBrief.colorDirection: deep charcoal, electric yellow, bright red accents, black
designBrief.inspiration: Bold street-food energy. Dark palette, condensed sans-serif. Urban, delivery-focused.
designBrief.avoidance: No warm/rustic tones (that's Family Pizzeria). No light/minimal (that's Village Pizza). Must not reuse fonts from other sites in this project.
designBrief.heroStyle: Dark background, oversized bold condensed type, neon-inspired accent color
designBrief.uniqueElement: Animated neon-style menu category highlights or delivery zone map
